siteSettings.heroSubtitle: Architectural visualization that transforms imagination into photorealistic immersive experiences.

projects.title: Minimalist Taipei
projects.subtitle: A Sanctuary of Light
projects.description: This residential project focuses on the interplay between natural materials and diffused light. Every surface was carefully selected to create a sense of calm — from the washed oak flooring to the hand-troweled plaster walls.

projects.title: Urban Loft
projects.subtitle: Industrial Elegance
projects.description: An industrial space transformed into a warm, inviting commercial environment. Exposed concrete meets warm wood tones and carefully placed greenery.

projects.title: Desert Villa
projects.subtitle: Where Sand Meets Sky
projects.description: A desert retreat that embraces the landscape. Floor-to-ceiling windows frame panoramic views while natural stone and earth tones create harmony with the surroundings.

projects.title: Glass Residence
projects.subtitle: Transparency Redefined
projects.description: A modern residence that blurs the line between indoor and outdoor living through extensive use of glass walls and open planning.

services.name: Standard
services.description: Perfect for visualizing a single room or concept with stunning realism.

services.name: Premium
services.description: Full property visualization that tells a complete spatial story.

services.name: Enterprise
services.description: For large-scale developments, commercial spaces, and ongoing partnerships.

aboutContent.headline:
We render
atmospheres.
aboutContent.descriptionLeft: Studio Design is an architectural visualization practice specializing in high-end residential and commercial spaces.
aboutContent.descriptionRight: We believe that an image is not just a representation of space, but a medium to convey the feeling of light, texture, and materiality. By leveraging advanced raytracing technology and meticulous attention to detail, we help architects and designers bridge the gap between imagination and reality.

contactContent.headline:
Let's shape
your vision.
contactContent.description: Whether you have detailed CAD drawings or just a napkin sketch, we'll bring your spatial concepts to photorealistic life.
